title: TAIGA 2 (Tinkers alloying addon port)
body:
First of all, let's take a minute to thank the two amazing dudes, Zkaface and IdleGandalf, for making this awesome mod, big thanks to both of you <3 Please go download their mod too!

Link : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/taiga-tinkers-alloying-addon

So, after months of tiresome work, I have finally did it! I made a quite stable port of TAIGA! There used to be quite a lot of missing content but I fixed that in my recent update, I only have to fix fluid physics, some spawning issues and add traits, maybe even balance this mod since a lot of people were complaining about it

IF you're curious, no! this mod isn't too different from the original, I will change/add/remove content later on, however. 

Also, please join my discord server if you want to know the new progress this mod will have! Or if you want to help and contribute to the mod :)!
Link : https://discord.gg/yBm5WTGsQa

Future Plans :

- Re-Work traits (Some traits are kinda not compatible with TC3, and some of them could have a bit of a twist to them)

- Balancing stats (some of them are too messy so I will probably spend a couple of days debating about them)

- Make alloys actually more useful

- Add a source code link to allow the community at helping me fix bugs

- Add a wiki, and probably an in-game guide book

- Probably more stuff too that I cant think of yet
